description.value:
Archetype

Your flames burn at a celestial intensity that no physical force can overcome. You gain the following permanent benefits (suppressed while Sea-Bound):

  • Your Logia Intangibility upgrades: you are now immune to all physical damage, including from magical sources.
  • Your fire damage ignores resistance.
  • Blazing Aura: At the start of each of your turns, each creature adjacent to you takes 1d8 fire damage (no save).
description.gm: The ImmunityData rule element here grants full physical immunity with no magical exception, superseding the dedication's immunity-with-exception. PF2E takes the more permissive immunity.
